author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625

patch.value: Scope: inspect the current pm-cli tracker as a living context map, verify the capability epic taxonomy, add or refine only non-duplicated actionable items, and record evidence through pm comments/files/tests/docs. Philosophy: project management = context management. Boundaries: use pm CLI mutations only; keep public docs free of private runbook details; do not hand-edit .agents/pm files.
2026-06-25 PM ecosystem taxonomy and context backlog normalization
Manual PM ecosystem inspection and tracker normalization so pm-cli remains a universal project-management baseline with SDK-backed customization primitives and complete context coverage.

Duplicate-safe status-all lineage search is recorded; all open capability epics are inspected; missing backlog is added under canonical parents; tracker health and validation pass; repo gates pass; PR review agents report no remaining findings; GitHub checks are green; Sentry and telemetry freshness are verified.
Local pm build is refreshed; pm context, status-all search, open list, and in-progress list were run before mutations.

Normalize the pm-cli tracker so features, code, tests, docs, goals, issues, decisions, epics, user stories, tasks, chores, improvements, and observability follow-up are represented as non-duplicated pm items.
A clean, non-duplicated tracker gives humans and agents a reliable context graph for the entire pm ecosystem.
The user requested a detailed manual inspection of all pm items and a best-practice organization pass before PR, review, merge, Sentry, and telemetry closeout.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Evidence: tracker governance normalization pass reduced metadata close_reason gaps from 18 to 0 using title/description/resolution context. validate --check-files now reports 0 missing linked paths and 0 orphaned paths after pm-j8z6 reconciliation. Remaining historical resolution metadata debt is tracked in pm-e9zh to avoid placeholder backfills.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Audit correction after changelog review: broad historical linked-file and stale-container mutations were pruned from this release branch because they touched hundreds of old PM records and caused generated CHANGELOG.md to mis-bucket old work as current. Kept product fixes are pm-bhtx (--status all aggregate sentinel) and pm-7o0s (stats history ENOENT/Sentry PM-CLI-1T). Deferred tracker-only backlog is now explicit in pm-j8z6, pm-psc0, pm-e9zh, pm-y1o4, pm-v37g, pm-a7o4, and pm-bhmk. Current validation baseline after pruning: lifecycle/history/command references ok; file validator warns with 146 missing linked paths and 162 orphaned paths; metadata warns with 24 missing AC/estimate, 18 missing close reasons, 2 duplicate GH code pairs; resolution warns with 253 historical terminal metadata gaps.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Final local evidence before PR: npm install -g . refreshed the global pm binary from this checkout; pnpm build passed; focused tests passed 29/29; pnpm contracts:check passed; pnpm quality:static passed; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passed 250 files / 5068 tests with 100% statements/branches/functions/lines; pnpm changelog:pm:check passed unchanged; pnpm security:scan found no credential-like secrets; pnpm audit --audit-level moderate found no known vulnerabilities; pm health --check-only --summary --json ok with warning_count=0; pm validate --check-lifecycle --check-command-references --check-history-drift --json ok with no warnings; pm aggregate --group-by parent --count --completion --include-unparented --status all passed after global refresh; pm stats --storage --json passed; linked pm-bhtx and pm-7o0s tests passed after tracker-context metadata correction; Sentry/telemetry required-mode gate passed with critical=0, high=0, telemetry finish_error_rate_pct=0.82, failures_without_error_code_rows=0.
